=== Updated as of May 1st 2026 ===

*[[Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055]] (Last edited: 2026-05-05T20:29:19Z, Ibjaja055 global edits: 29,779)
*[[Hardware donation program/EYo237]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T23:03:39Z, EYo237 global edits: 5,957)
*[[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T17:20:57Z, Pharouqenr global edits: 63,241)
*[[Hardware donation program/Nnamadee]] (Last edited: 2026-05-19T19:51:06Z, Nnamadee global edits: 20,212)
*[[Hardware donation program/Senator Choko]] (Last edited: 2026-05-12T06:51:36Z, Senator Choko global edits: 7,998)
*[[Hardware donation program/BnHamid]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T15:47:10Z, BnHamid global edits: 79,742)
*[[Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]] (Last edited: 2026-05-03T10:41:05Z, ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ global edits: 2,955)
*[[Hardware donation program/sardeeq]] (Last edited: 2026-05-19T22:13:37Z, Sardeeq global edits: 30,231)
*[[Hardware donation program/Dolphyb]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T20:43:12Z, Dolphyb global edits: 2,378,585)
*[[Hardware donation program/Yendifa]] (Last edited: 2026-05-10T19:22:39Z, Yendifa global edits: 7,607)
*[[Hardware donation program/Sir Amugi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-15T04:23:12Z, Sir Amugi global edits: 61,597)
*[[Hardware donation program/Muhdavdullahi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-15T10:49:20Z, Muhdavdullahi global edits: 25,204)
*[[Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman]] (Last edited: 2026-05-09T15:25:42Z, Shahidul Hasan Roman global edits: 16,890)
*[[Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T06:20:25Z, Ballardmaize global edits: 41,851)
*[[Hardware donation program/Pragathi. BH]] (Last edited: 2026-05-13T11:21:54Z, Pragathi. BH global edits: 18,117)
*[[Hardware donation program/Vinoda mamatharai]] (Last edited: 2026-05-13T11:24:01Z, Vinoda mamatharai global edits: 8,672)
*[[Hardware donation program/Transmummy]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T22:15:26Z, Transmummy global edits: 61)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse]] (Last edited: 2026-05-12T23:26:55Z, Mercyuniverse global edits: 1,417)
*[[Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré]] (Last edited: 2026-05-20T03:18:01Z, Nguini Désiré global edits: 2,002)
*[[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]] (Last edited: 2026-05-21T17:11:54Z, Agbalagba global edits: 10,837)
*[[Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince]] (Last edited: 2026-06-15T15:27:57Z, Chinemeremprince global edits: 16,616)
*[[Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-29T09:23:41Z, Ola.mahadi global edits: 11,098)
*[[Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun]] (Last edited: 2026-06-05T10:01:47Z, Hamed Gamaoun global edits: unknown)
*[[Hardware donation program/Jwale2]] (Last edited: 2026-05-20T22:59:44Z, Jwale2 global edits: 26,085)
*[[Hardware donation program/Tmamatha]] (Last edited: 2026-05-13T20:40:33Z, Tmamatha global edits: 7,502)
*[[Hardware donation program/V Bhavya]] (Last edited: 2026-05-22T11:37:11Z, V Bhavya global edits: 94,099)
*[[Hardware donation program/रोहित साव27]] (Last edited: 2026-05-26T10:48:14Z, रोहित साव27 global edits: 104,201)
*[[Hardware donation program/muralikrishna m]] (Last edited: 2026-05-27T13:16:47Z, Muralikrishna m global edits: 47,892)
*[[Hardware donation program/Nicole mwenge]] (Last edited: 2026-06-01T21:17:24Z, Nicole mwenge global edits: 8,001)
*[[Hardware donation program/Albetudu]] (Last edited: 2026-06-03T16:02:20Z, Albetudu global edits: 3,018)
*[[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] (Last edited: 2026-06-17T05:53:46Z, নৰুনা বৰুৱা global edits: 15,940)
*[[Hardware donation program/Aminwa 21]] (Last edited: 2026-06-15T15:26:20Z, Aminwa 21 global edits: 3,720)
*[[Hardware donation program/Joy Agyepong (2nd Application)]] (Last edited: 2026-06-17T12:25:38Z, Joy Agyepong global edits: 5,457)

=== Messaged to update application ===

*[[Hardware donation program/Leeturtle]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T02:30:41Z, Leeturtle global edits: 4,796)
*[[Hardware donation program/Emmanuel Anin]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T20:29:49Z, Emmanuel Anin global edits: 7,733)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mbaidoo]] (Last edited: 2026-06-02T15:11:32Z, Mbaidoo global edits: 2,681)
*[[Hardware donation program/Pragathi. BH]] (Last edited: 2026-05-13T11:21:54Z, Pragathi. BH global edits: 18,117)
*[[Hardware donation program/Obangmoy]] (Last edited: 2026-06-02T08:21:47Z, Obangmoy global edits: 8,650)
*[[Hardware donation program/Santhosh Notagar]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T17:34:37Z, Santhosh Notagar global edits: 5,872)
*[[Hardware donation program/vinoda mamatharai]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T11:04:34Z, Vinoda mamatharai global edits: 8,672)
*[[Hardware donation program/Thirumalgoud]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T18:02:48Z, Thirumalgoud global edits: 4,920)
*[[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]] (Last edited: 2026-05-21T17:11:54Z, Agbalagba global edits: 10,837)
*[[Hardware donation program/Thiyagu Ganesh]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T17:27:04Z, Thiyagu Ganesh global edits: 5,922)
*[[Hardware donation program/Таңһылыу]] (Last edited: 2026-06-01T13:07:40Z, Таңһылыу global edits: 31,299)
*[[Hardware donation program/Amikeco]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T21:01:41Z, Amikeco global edits: 37,035)
*[[Hardware donation program/Һәҙиә]] (Last edited: 2026-05-18T16:48:25Z, Һәҙиә global edits: 9,916)
*[[Hardware donation program/Cbrescia]] (Last edited: 2026-06-01T18:36:40Z, Felino Volador global edits: 126,759)
*[[Hardware donation program/Dezedien]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T18:12:26Z, Dezedien global edits: 64,196)
*[[Hardware donation program/Vinoda mamatharai]] (Last edited: 2026-05-13T11:24:01Z, Vinoda mamatharai global edits: 8,672)
*[[Hardware donation program/Senator Choko]] (Last edited: 2026-05-12T06:51:36Z, Senator Choko global edits: 7,998)
*[[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T17:20:57Z, Pharouqenr global edits: 63,241)

=== Draft requests ===

*[[Hardware donation program/Adeyinka Ekundayo]] (Last edited: 2026-06-08T05:01:30Z, Adeyinka Ekundayo global edits: 629)
*[[Hardware donation program/Africany]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T14:34:58Z, Africany global edits: 17,047)
*[[Hardware donation program/AKibombo]] (Last edited: 2021-02-25T05:37:12Z, AKibombo global edits: 13,251)
*[[Hardware donation program/Albetudu]] (Last edited: 2026-06-03T16:02:20Z, Albetudu global edits: 3,018)
*[[Hardware donation program/Amikeco]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T21:01:41Z, Amikeco global edits: 37,035)
*[[Hardware donation program/Asamoah Daniel Kwame Oware]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T13:55:43Z, Asamoah Daniel Kwame Oware global edits: 4,045)
*[[Hardware donation program/Ashish D Souza]] (Last edited: 2018-04-23T07:57:48Z, Ashish D Souza global edits: 170)
*[[Hardware donation program/Babulbaishya]] (Last edited: 2023-02-21T02:47:13Z, BabulB global edits: 59,982)
*[[Hardware donation program/Balu1967]] (Last edited: 2023-02-10T10:27:48Z, Balu1967 global edits: 68,143)
*[[Hardware donation program/Bamjos]] (Last edited: 2026-06-19T04:07:12Z, Bamjos global edits: 18,684)
*[[Hardware donation program/Bembety]] (Last edited: 2026-05-18T09:56:58Z, Bembety global edits: 37,531)
*[[Hardware donation program/BENET G AMANNA]] (Last edited: 2023-02-27T07:53:35Z, BENET G AMANNA global edits: 1,642)
*[[Hardware donation program/CalebTokula6]] (Last edited: 2026-05-08T10:32:07Z, CalebTokula6 global edits: 953)
*[[Hardware donation program/Charles Kalanzi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T12:34:56Z, Charles Kalanzi global edits: 5,992)
*[[Hardware donation program/Chicocvenancio]] (Last edited: 2019-02-27T22:04:36Z, Chicocvenancio global edits: 35,726)
*[[Hardware donation program/Chizoba Amanambu]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T18:01:43Z, Chizoba Amanambu global edits: 95)
*[[Hardware donation program/ChéRatou]] (Last edited: 2026-05-08T14:16:26Z, ChéRatou global edits: 4,685)
*[[Hardware donation program/Dev ammar]] (Last edited: 2026-05-16T04:34:24Z, Dev ammar global edits: 5,897)
*[[Hardware donation program/DjMlindos]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T17:24:12Z, DjMlindos global edits: 17)
*[[Hardware donation program/Emmanuel Anin]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T20:29:49Z, Emmanuel Anin global edits: 7,733)
*[[Hardware donation program/Ennydavids]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T13:03:22Z, Ennydavids global edits: 4,281)
*[[Hardware donation program/Eunice Ameh]] (Last edited: 2026-05-14T12:44:12Z, Eunice Ameh global edits: 2,439)
*[[Hardware donation program/Germain92]] (Last edited: 2024-01-10T16:31:56Z, Germain92 global edits: 2,570)
*[[Hardware donation program/Ibrahim abusufyan]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T16:12:56Z, Ibrahim abusufyan global edits: 39,678)
*[[Hardware donation program/Jurema Moraes de Oliveira]] (Last edited: 2020-01-30T11:10:33Z, Jurema Moraes de Oliveira global edits: unknown)
*[[Hardware donation program/justwiki]] (Last edited: 2026-05-14T22:35:17Z, Justwiki global edits: 103,596)
*[[Hardware donation program/Kalakpagh]] (Last edited: 2026-05-10T10:11:20Z, Kalakpagh global edits: 41,218)
*[[Hardware donation program/Kikanakana]] (Last edited: 2026-06-16T16:26:07Z, Kikanakana global edits: 2,210)
*[[Hardware donation program/Knowledge and philosophy]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T02:09:57Z, Knowledge and philosophy global edits: 3,399)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mahensingha]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T17:46:31Z, Mahensingha global edits: 8,837)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mahuta]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T13:23:35Z, Mahuta global edits: 40,267)
*[[Hardware donation program/Manamarthe]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T12:02:29Z, Manamarthe global edits: 5,505)
*[[Hardware donation program/Maryleine]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T13:33:07Z, Maryleine global edits: 3,328)
*[[Hardware donation program/Merci Kahubangwa]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T16:53:36Z, Merci Kahubangwa global edits: 1,201)
*[[Hardware donation program/Micheal Kaluba]] (Last edited: 2026-05-07T19:25:39Z, MichealKal global edits: 16,119)
*[[Hardware donation program/MP1999]] (Last edited: 2023-03-30T12:39:29Z, TypeInfo global edits: 10,831)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mr. Snatch]] (Last edited: 2026-06-08T06:23:45Z, Mr. Snatch global edits: 15,757)
*[[Hardware donation program/Muhdavdullahi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-15T10:49:20Z, Muhdavdullahi global edits: 25,204)
*[[Hardware donation program/Mwintirew]] (Last edited: 2026-05-16T09:14:17Z, Mwintirew global edits: 5,616)
*[[Hardware donation program/Nicole mwenge]] (Last edited: 2026-06-01T21:17:24Z, Nicole mwenge global edits: 8,001)
*[[Hardware donation program/Noooote]] (Last edited: 2026-06-08T06:24:15Z, Noooote global edits: 1,852)
*[[Hardware donation program/Obedmakolo]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T22:09:30Z, Obedmakolo global edits: 8,206)
*[[Hardware donation program/Ogundele1]] (Last edited: 2026-05-18T11:53:58Z, Ogundele1 global edits: 2,778)
*[[Hardware donation program/Oluchi-KC]] (Last edited: 2026-05-06T12:38:20Z, Oluchi-KC global edits: 50)
*[[Hardware donation program/Orokbest1]] (Last edited: 2026-05-27T19:14:15Z, Orokbest1 global edits: 22,297)
*[[Hardware donation program/Pallaviv123]] (Last edited: 2023-02-09T12:00:22Z, Pallaviv123 global edits: 6,234)
*[[Hardware donation program/PediAki]] (Last edited: 2019-08-16T14:41:21Z, PediAki global edits: 11,413)
*[[Hardware donation program/Premchand murmu thakur]] (Last edited: 2026-06-04T06:18:28Z, Nacharhopon global edits: 1,620)
*[[Hardware donation program/raavimohantydelhi]] (Last edited: 2017-08-13T05:56:00Z, Raavimohantydelhi global edits: 1,387)
*[[Hardware donation program/SA twenty SA twenty]] (Last edited: 2026-05-09T21:41:10Z, SA twenty SA twenty global edits: unknown)
*[[Hardware donation program/Salmooz]] (Last edited: 2026-06-08T05:02:30Z, Salmooz global edits: 277)
*[[Hardware donation program/SALMOOZ]] (Last edited: 2026-05-21T06:34:58Z, SALMOOZ global edits: unknown)
*[[Hardware donation program/Sir Amugi]] (Last edited: 2026-05-15T04:23:12Z, Sir Amugi global edits: 61,597)
*[[Hardware donation program/Tenaciuos Ntaawa]] (Last edited: 2026-05-09T18:22:57Z, Tenaciuos Ntaawa global edits: 9,207)
*[[Hardware donation program/Transmummy]] (Last edited: 2026-05-11T22:15:26Z, Transmummy global edits: 61)
*[[Hardware donation program/Vaija]] (Last edited: 2020-03-16T12:47:14Z, Vaija global edits: 14,809)
*[[Hardware donation program/vidyu44]] (Last edited: 2023-02-09T15:18:40Z, Vidyu44 global edits: 3,435)
*[[Hardware donation program/Vision L1]] (Last edited: 2026-05-19T09:32:53Z, Vision L1 global edits: 24,397)
*[[Hardware donation program/Качуровська]] (Last edited: 2026-03-05T17:43:30Z, Качуровська global edits: 20,892)
*[[Hardware donation program/Учитель]] (Last edited: 2020-04-29T19:59:11Z, Валентина Кодола global edits: 14,572)
*[[Hardware donation program/अनुश्री साव]] (Last edited: 2023-03-05T03:41:53Z, अनुश्री साव global edits: 23,734)
*[[Hardware donation program/श्रेष्ठ भूपेन्द्र]] (Last edited: 2022-04-14T23:09:09Z, श्रेष्ठ भूपेन्द्र global edits: unknown)
*[[Hardware donation program/हिंदुस्थान वासी]] (Last edited: 2019-09-07T09:36:11Z, हिंदुस्थान वासी global edits: 61,968)
*[[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]] (Last edited: 2026-06-17T05:53:46Z, নৰুনা বৰুৱা global edits: 15,940)
